title: Wind-light energy and shore-electricity charged storage-battery electric ship …
abstract_clean: The invention relates to a wind-light energy and shore-electricity charged storage-battery electric ship and a control method thereof. The electric ship comprises a catamaran body, wherein an electric propulsion device is respectively connected with a storage battery and a charger, the charger is connected with the storage battery, and an shore-electricity access device is arranged on the charger; a wind power generator and a solar battery plate are connected with the charger through a control desk; an alternating-current square-wave permanent-magnetic brushless direct-current motor controlled by a PWM (Pulse Width Modulation) technology and driven by a phase-decoupling type direct-current variable-frequency stepless speed-regulation controller is adopted in the electric propulsion device; the solar battery plate is also arranged on the catamaran body; a rapidly-chargeable lithium-iron phosphate power storage battery is adopted as the storage battery; and a plurality of temperature control devices are installed in a battery cabin for placing the storage battery. The invention greatly enhances the cruising capability of ships, avoids the occurrence of non-electric states, has high energy utilization efficiency, is safe and reliable and is beneficial to practical use.
claims_clean: 2. the accumulator electric ship of a kind of wind/light energy according to claim 1, bank electricity charging is characterized in that: described battery flat is positioned at catamaran hull (1) bottom, and near electric propulsion apparatus (4).
description_clean:
Accumulator electric ship and the control method of wind/light energy, the charging of bank electricity
Technical field
The present invention relates to a kind of electric ship is control method, particularly a kind of accumulator electric ship and control method that is suitable for practical a kind of wind/light energy, the charging of bank electricity.
Background technology
Existing conventional diesel engine boats and ships occupy dominant position, diesel engine poor efficiency (below 30%) pollutes, there is flue dust stink noise industrial profit, water body and aquatic organism and environment are caused serious pollution and harm, and be unfavorable for that the crewman is healthy, adopting power-actuated accumulator electric boats and ships is following developing direction, efficient (higher than 60%) zero-emission; Chinese patent 2008100483196, disclose a kind of " full electric ship of charging accumulator of wind, light and electricity composite energy resource ", can stop the pollution of diesel engine fully, and taken full advantage of wind, light and electric power compound energy charging accumulator and drive, safeguard simple, easy to operate.But also there is following deficiency in this technical scheme:
One, energy efficiency is not high
Existing battery efficiency is lower and charge discharge efficiency is not high, and for example the general energy efficiency of storage battery is 55%-75%, and lead-acid storage battery most effective is only 75%-80%, and the efficient of general power frequency battery charger is lower than 70%;
Existing general AC and DC electrical motor efficient is not high enough, and lower than the efficient of permanent magnet motor, and general electric ship accessory drive does not reclaim braking energy, realizes energy back, carries out recycling.The accumulator electric boats and ships great majority that for example run on enclosed water adopt lead-acid storage battery and can not reclaim kinetic energy, and the accumulator electric boats and ships in Hangzhou West Lake and the Qinhuaihe River, Nanjing are not always the case, and all can only work in the short distance enclosed water;
Wind speed on general River Channel mostly is 1-3 m/s, according to test, in
certain city
1 year, the time of 1-3 m/s wind speed reaches 300 days, the above time of 3 m/s wind speed reaches 150 days, and existing aerogenerator startup wind speed is 3m/s, wind power utilization efficient is not high, because the startup that existing aerogenerator needs and work wind speed is high and generally be adopted as synchronous electric generator, so the efficient of the general land traditional wind of having used is lower, thereby causes the cost performance of aerogenerator not high.
Two, the light-receiving area of solar panel is too little.Utilization ratio is too low
Along with technological advance, the price of existing solar panel declines to a great extent, but due to the solar power poor efficiency, light-receiving area is required impact large and that be subjected to the catamaran hull face area, make boats and ships that the light-receiving area of solar panel can be installed too little, and the control policy performance is not good, and utilization ratio is lower.
Three, there is potential safety hazard in storage battery
General storage battery low energy is although and there are major safety risks in traditional lithium cell high energy.The lithium-ions battery of tradition noble metal and rare metal, as cobalt acid lithium, LiMn2O4 ion accumulator to voltage-sensitive and easy catching fire, the temperature management system in actv. battery cabin owing to lacking high energy saving simultaneously adopts the electronlmobil of traditional lithium ion battery and nickel-hydrogen accumulator that case because of battery cell high-temp combustion and blast is arranged.Existing adopt traditional lithium ion battery for guaranteeing safety, need to be every battery set temperature sensor.Thereby make battery management system very complicated and increase cost, the accumulator electric boats and ships that are in the starting stage are made the matter worse.To such an extent as to be difficult to select storage battery, and cause user's anxiety to look around.
Four, traditional storage battery electric ship scheme great majority all adopt lead-acid storage battery and tradition that brush poor efficiency DC motor is arranged, and too principle, the generalities of above-mentioned patent, adopt which kind of battery charger, aerogenerator, maneuver control device, battery thermal management system, how to control all uncertain, lack practicality, lack the practicable scheme of the wind-light-electricity accumulator electric boats and ships of forming a complete and comprehensive system for collecting real estate fees integrated.
Five, present unstable, the poor efficiency of wind/light energy, storage battery low energy causes that accumulator electric ship endurance is low, the boats and ships index is not high and too much relies on harbour bank electricity, is difficult to satisfy the actual market demand.
Summary of the invention
Technical matters to be solved by this invention is to provide the accumulator electric ship of a kind of wind/light energy, the charging of bank electricity, can utilize fully wind, light and electric power energy, improve the flying power of boats and ships, improve the cost performance of integral device, increase safety, reach the target of actual use.
For solving the problems of the technologies described above, the technical solution adopted in the present invention is: the accumulator electric ship of a kind of wind/light energy, the charging of bank electricity, comprise catamaran hull, electric propulsion apparatus is connected with battery charger with storage battery respectively by the compound type central control desk, and battery charger is provided with bank electricity access device;
Also be provided with aerogenerator and solar panel on catamaran hull, aerogenerator is connected with the compound type central control desk by the wind/light energy power generation control with solar panel, and is connected with storage battery by the compound type central control desk;
The square wave permanent magnetic brushless direct current motor that adopts phase decoupling type direct current frequency-variable stepless speed regulation controller that the PWM technology that can the regenerative brake mode reclaims braking kinetic energy is controlled to drive in electric propulsion apparatus;
Storage battery adopts the LiFePO4 power accumulator of quickly-chargeable;
Place in the battery flat of storage battery a plurality of temperature control apparatuss are installed, temperature control apparatus is connected with the accumulator room room temperature centralized control read out instrument of compound type central control desk inside by cable.
Described aerogenerator is many carbon fiber fan blade magnetic suspension vertical shaft wind machines and the wind power generating set that the brushless dual-feedback wind power generator that can assist wind machine speed governing frequency modulation forms, and works in the variable speed constant frequency mode.
Described solar panel is the solar panels of diaphragm type, adopts the combination of fixed type and movable two kinds of mounting meanss, movable and catamaran hull both sides flexible connection, but folding and unfolding.
Be provided with in described compound type central control desk and carry out that various energy resources generating-charging distribution is controlled and advance the power consumption control ship-handling to handle and control and to the storage battery cabin concentrating micro controller system and/or the PLC of temperature and heat control, be provided with in the wind/light energy power generation control and carry out the micro controller system that the wind/light energy generating implements to follow the tracks of maximum power control, the wind/light energy power generation control is arranged in the compound type central control desk.
Described wind/light energy power generation control adopts the intelligence control method of MPPT MPPT maximum power point tracking for solar power, adopt maximum output power to follow the tracks of wind speed control method for aerogenerator.
Described battery charger adopts Quarantine at assembly sites class high frequency switch power type charging equipment, can utilize the bank electricity to carry out fast charge to storage battery and can utilize battery charger by storage battery onshore electricity electrical network discharge.
Described battery flat is positioned at bottom catamaran hull, and near electric propulsion apparatus.
Described temperature control apparatus is comprised of temperature sensor, minitype motivation radiator and ventilator tube, be distributed in the storage battery cabin everywhere with dot matrix way, wherein have at least a temperature control apparatus to be located at battery flat and install between the cabin of electric propulsion apparatus, be used for promoting the temperature of battery flat, by temperature control apparatus, the temperature of battery flat is controlled at 40-70 , operating temperature can manually arrange automatic control and adjustment.
Also establish soc storage battery charge state measurement mechanism, stepless speed regulating operating device in described compound type central control desk and a grade speed governing operating device is arranged.Stepless speed regulating operating device and have grade speed governing operating device respectively the direct control electric propulsion apparatus carry out an electrical motor infinite speed variation and grade speed governing operation is arranged, realize propulsion of ship.
A kind of method of controlling the accumulator electric ship of above-mentioned wind/light energy, the charging of bank electricity, comprise the following steps: the electricity of depositing in storage battery is converted into mileage or work-hours, add mileage value or work-hours that the auxiliary charging value of the aerogenerator estimated and solar panel is converted into, then according to the path computing formula, obtain the when and where that pulls in to shore to charge, avoid occurring electroless state by above step.
The accumulator electric ship of a kind of wind/light energy provided by the invention, the charging of bank electricity, by adopting the combination of square wave permanent magnetic brushless direct current motor, LiFePO4 power accumulator, magnetic suspension vertical shaft aerogenerator, retractable solar panel and temperature control apparatus, compared with prior art has outstanding substantive distinguishing features, the present invention simultaneously also has significant progress, and concrete beneficial effect is as follows:
1) the present invention improves ship performance from two aspects of increasing income and decreasing expenditure, and is mainly to improve endurance, is the dependence of bank electricity to reduce for port and pier, sets up in a wide range as far as possible energy utilization clean energy resource, also energy-saving and cost-reducing as far as possible, realizes zero-emission and zero carbonization.
2) aspect increasing income: utilize wind energy and luminous energy round-the-clockly; The LiFePO4 power accumulator that adopts safe and efficient high energy quickly-chargeable may get final product many store electrical energy with what expansion utilized honourable electric energy;
Adopt the combination of fast charge technology, quickly-chargeable storage battery and charging equipment to take full advantage of the bank electricity and process of charging is oversimplified;
Adopt the magnetic suspension vertical shaft aerogenerator can take full advantage of gentle breeze, improve the cost performance of whole wind energy utilization and wind power plant, for example can guarantee the quality of power supply of constant frequency and follow the tracks of to greatest extent wind speed, improve speed of response and can work in larger wind speed range, improving wind energy utilization efficiency.
The solar panel that is flexibly connected with catamaran hull both sides by opening can enlarge the boats and ships light-receiving area, takes full advantage of solar power.Solar power and wind power generation controller adopt maximal power tracing to control, but optimal control obtains optimum efficiency in controlling unit.The binary boats and ships both can improve stability, can reduce ship resistance again, but landing pier is convenient in the solar panels folding and unfolding.
3) aspect throttling, adopt the efficient battery charger of Quarantine at assembly sites class high frequency switch power type, efficient can reach more than 98%, efficient LiFePO4 power accumulator efficient reaches 96%, higher than all storage batterys, the efficient of general miniature electric motor is all higher than 90%, high capacity motor is higher than 97%, permanent magnet brushless electromotor efficient is higher, higher than general conventional motors, in permanent magnet brushless electromotor, the square wave permanent magnetic motor efficiency that the present invention adopts is higher than sine wave permanent magnet brushless motor, energy density is higher, exempt from later maintenance, safe reliability is high, because the interaction of square wave field is greater than the interaction of sine wave magnetic field.Adopt that the highest square wave electrical motor of present efficient and energy density and high-energy and high-efficiency storage battery are supporting can improve energy efficiency, expendable weight to greatest extent, the control policy that adopts simultaneously soft start and infinite speed variation accurately to control also can greatly reduce energy consumption raises the efficiency, and this has significant effect for improving endurance.With regard to last factor, because the accumulator electric boats and ships need a large amount of storage batterys, endurance requires, and storage battery quantity higher, that need to be equipped with is larger.Due to the relative low energy of storage battery, so the weight of storage battery becomes the boats and ships significant load at present.Adopt high-energy battery to mean and carry same energy, weight can alleviate greatly.For example ferric phosphate lithium cell is compared with lead-acid storage battery, weight and volume all only have its 1/3rd.Mean that maintenance weight is constant, endurance can improve three times, and perhaps battery weight alleviates 2/3rds, and propulsion coefficient also obtains to improve.
By the square wave permanent magnetic brushless direct current motor actuator in electric propulsion apparatus can be reclaimed braking kinetic energy when the Ship brake.This is also the content of increasing income.
(the Chen Quanshi chief editor of chemical industry press " advanced electric vehicle engineering ",-Beijing: record 2007.7): the power or the efficient that are delivered at last on wheel of travelling at the orthodox car in city according to test, one are 12.6%, wherein overcoming air resistance is 2.6%, overcoming rolling resistance is 4.2%, the energy that is used for braking is 5.8%, and the latter is about half of useful work.Illustrate that braking consumes larger, its kinetic energy is also larger.Boats and ships do not have mechanical brake, can only adopt electric braking, reclaim kinetic energy in braking, not only do not need to pay brake energy, kinetic energy can also be fed back in storage battery with generation mode, and this one-in-and-one-out is approximately the braking energy of twice, considerable benefit.Adopt regenerative brake self power generation reverse charge technology to reclaim kinetic energy according to Chutian Metroplis Daily 2006,11, the 2 strange flower bud VRM Electrical Bicycles of report, compare strength with traditional product and increase 30%, continual mileage improves 50%, improves service lifetime of accumulator two, 3 years, is increased to 4 years by present 1 year.According to record in People's Telecon Publishing House " Electrical Bicycle practical technique " (the experts database member of bicycle productivity promotion center, Tianjin writes 2008), for the larger city of surface slope or crowded traffic, need the big and medium-sized cities of frequent braking, the effect of reverse charge---electric braking can increase
continual mileage
10%-20% of battery-driven car usually.According to record in press of Beijing Institute of Technology " modern electric vehicle engineering " (Chen Qingquan, Sun Fengchun, wish good light write in November, 2002 the first edition): battery electrics adopts the second quadrant type DC chopper to be used for the DC motor regenerative brake, make energy from loading to power supply, can make the electronlmobil continual mileage increase more than 25%.
The temperature that keeps battery flat by temperature control apparatus also can further improve the usefulness of LiFePO4 power accumulator.The hot aversion to cold of this storage battery happiness in suitable range of temperatures, can guarantee that not only storage battery uses safety, care storage battery to improve the serviceability rate reliability, and can improve this storage battery energy efficient, and active volume.Suitable temperature can make the charge discharge efficiency of storage battery improve 3-5%.
By set up in a wide range the energy with rigorously enforce energy-conservation increase income and decrease expenditure supporting, wind-light-electricity complements one another, wind-light-electricity and efficient battery charger, storage battery, efficiently the square wave electrical motor and control policy supporting etc., multiple integrated effect is the improving performance index exponentially.For example, many magnetic suspending wind turbine generators and accumulator electric ship are supporting, can utilize gentle breeze and increase generating dutation, and interrelate with charging modes and storage battery and can realize easily the variable speed constant frequency pattern and enlarge the wind power utilization scope.Wind/light energy is supporting, can round-the-clockly charge, and the chance of charging is doubled, be 200%.For endurance, if hypothesis can improve k doubly aspect increasing income, for convenience of calculating, also suppose to reduce k doubly aspect throttling, final endurance can promote k

4) safe reliability height and energy-conservation laying equal stress on.Due to the measuring device that has been equipped with charging and discharging, so can facilitate the crewman to monitor battery charge discharge and the situation of depositing electric situation and storage battery, can automatically estimate by the programming of micro controller system the when and where that uses the bank electricity, for example, electricity be will deposit and mileage or work-hours converted to, add the correction of auxiliary charging by built-in path calculation program, can calculate the when and where that need to pull in to shore to charge.Be conducive to accomplish to know what's what, improve reliability, avoid occurring without the electric wind danger.Simultaneously can be convenient to carry out the energy-saving run operation and control, improve the energy-saving horizontal of bookkeeping link.Owing to being equipped with infinite speed variation and having had two kinds of handling device of grade speed governing standby each other, therefore make the crewman multiple choices arranged, can adapt to preferably crewman's operating habit, and be conducive to improve reliability, be conducive to penetration and promotion.The case that general traditional lithium ion battery safety performance is poor, electronlmobil has burning, and the safety performance of LiFePO4 power accumulator is good, and be equipped with storage battery temperature management system, temperature management system has two kinds of facilities and two kinds of methods: the temperature control apparatus with temperature sensor and radiator in the central control console of operator's compartment and storage battery cabin; Can utilize attemperating unit to concentrate monitoring on the operator's station of operator's compartment and control, can carry out whole the ventilation and two kinds of controls of local ventilation, in the storage battery cabin, the operating ambient temperature that utilization is carried out A.T.C and forced heat radiation with the temperature control apparatus of temperature sensor and radiator and kept storage battery is being conducive to improve 40-70  of battery efficiency, have data to show, suitable temperature can make the charge discharge efficiency of storage battery improve 3-5%.And battery flat improves the battery flat temperature near the heat that electric propulsion apparatus is conducive to obtain power pack section, also is conducive to reduce simultaneously line loss, and the profit of so can fully taping the latent power gives up, utilizes resources circulation to use.
Temperature control has two kinds of facilities and two kinds of methods are conducive to improve temperature controlled particularity and energy-saving horizontal.Avoided the way of the radiating and cooling that strong wind blows suddenly, the targeted limited heat radiation of purpose can have been arranged and be conducive to formation temperature field distribution homogenizing, can realize dispelling the heat keeps temperature and energy-conservation target.The Centralized Controller of operator's compartment has two kinds of controls of whole ventilation and local ventilation, the temperature control apparatus with temperature sensor and radiator in storage battery cabin can be realized the control of distributing temperature, can give top priority to what is the most important and carry out targetedly radiating control and obtain hot blast by drafting apparatus from the cabin of electric propulsion apparatus, and can take the forced heat radiation venting practice, be conducive to energy-conservation and realize the temperature constant that temperature homogenisation distributes and keeps the battery-operated environment.Adopt the mode that the temperature control apparatus decentralised control with temperature sensor and radiator in operator's compartment temperature Centralized controller and storage battery cabin combines to carry out the battery thermal management, both can form fixing temperature field and distributed and be conducive to know what's what, have again concentrated radiating control and emphasis decentralised control two kinds of temperature control modes, have multiple choices and be conducive to insulation and prevent overheated; Both can carry out automatic temperature-adjusting control and forced heat radiation, to prevent the overheated operating ambient temperature of guaranteeing safety and keeping storage battery, can save energy again.Temperature sensor and drafting apparatus all are connected with micro controller system on control desk, realize automatically controlling according to the parameter of setting, and actv. has been guaranteed the energy-conservation and safety of storage battery.
5) ferric phosphate lithium cell and control policy and coordinative composition of equipments can reclaim braking kinetic energy easily.According to the rule of electronlmobil, generally carry out recover kinetic energy and need to adopt ultracapacitor, can not absorb fast kinetic energy because the specific power value of storage battery is less, so normal controller need to adopt the resistance absorption energy to reduce feedback voltage.Because the specific power value of ferric phosphate lithium cell is larger, so do not need the help of ultracapacitor, just can reclaim easily braking kinetic energy, this characteristic finds expression in the performance of its fast charge.Reclaim braking kinetic energy and can increase storage battery useful capacity and boats and ships endurance.
In addition, adopt ferric phosphate lithium cell to have comprehensive advantage and value.Be better than tradition as household electrical appliances instrument and meter lithium ion battery as power accumulator, this storage battery has multifrequency nature: the high-energy and high-efficiency rate means the raising with energy-conservation and endurance of alleviating of load from heavy and light; Working temperature range broad (20 -+75 ) has high-temperature stability LiFePO4 electric heating peak value can reach 350 -500 , and LiMn2O4 and cobalt acid lithium are only 200  of left and right; Liking hot aversion to cold is conducive to utilize the heat that boats and ships send and brings into play self-characteristic, demonstrates the anastomose property with boats and ships; Less the being perfectly safe property that can not burn that determined of electrochemical process heating, desirable fire-fighting only burning safety precautions, can simplify system and greatly reduce cost; Extremely strong anti-abuse ability can guarantee safety and keep good performance, but super-charge super-discharge for example with large rate of discharge discharge, for example 10C, can not damage battery even discharge into zero voltage yet; The fast charge excellent fills soon with 2C, and half an hour, abundance reached 95%.Fill soon with 5C, 12 minutes can be sufficient, and portioned product can adopt 30 C to fill soon; Overlong service life recycles often; At room temperature the 1C charge and discharge cycles is 2000 times, and capability retention is more than 80%, is 5 times of lead-acid battery, 4 times of Ni-MH battery, 4 times of cobalt acid lithium battery, the 4-5 of lithium manganate battery doubly left and right; No matter the memoryless property of ferric phosphate lithium cell is in any state, can be with filling with use, and need not first discharge and recharge, and there are Memorability in ni-mh, nickel-cadmium cell; Do not pollute fully; Raw MAT'L extensively is easy to get, can forms cheap basis.In a word, adopt this storage battery to have safe and efficient high life, quickly-chargeable, reclaim kinetic energy, convenient management easily, when self greatly improving ship performance, can consist of the technical foundation of increasing income and decreasing expenditure, form multiple advantage and integrated effect.This battery characteristics is being accomplished something difficult and so deserve praise at present, can consist of High Performance accumulator electric boats and ships, improve the existing ship performance.
6) solar panel adopts two combinations of fixed type and boats and ships two side of a ship deployable and collapsibles, and except increasing light-receiving area, the structure of two side of a ship deployable and collapsibles is conducive to landing pier, adopt the solar panels of diaphragm type, weight is lighter and handier, and folding and unfolding is controlled convenient and simple, consumes energy low.

consumption ways.The mode of utilizing wind/light energy take expansion is as storage battery in time charges, the use that all is conducive to storage battery with low-frequency pulse care storage
